about.title: Worker + AI becomes Workeron.AI.
about.description: Like an operon is a basic functional unit in a cell, Workeron is the basic functional unit of a modern business. We build the core operational elements that let companies scale, automate and perform with precision.

blog.title: From the Workeron Lab
blog.subtitle: Practical guides on AI deployment and automation strategy.

team.title: Built by Humans & Machines
team.subtitle: We design, build, and deploy AI systems that transform business operations.

partnership.title: Backed by Strategic Capital Expertise.
partnership.description: As a portfolio company of AmA Invest Capital, Workeron scales industrial-grade AI solutions with deep operational support. Our partnership enables us to transform complex legacy systems into autonomous agentic architectures at global scale.
partnership.quote: Bridging the gap between raw AI potential and enterprise-grade execution through strategic investment and process redesign.

careers.title: Build the Future of Autonomous Work.
careers.description: We are engineering a new category of digital employees. Join our multidisciplinary team of builders, researchers, and visionaries to design systems that don't just process data, but execute missions.

howWeWork.title: From manual operations to agentic execution
howWeWork.subtitle: We redesign fragmented workflows into intelligent, fast, human-supervised automation.

contact.title: Design Your Digital Workforce
contact.description: Tell us about your process and goals. We will outline impact, timeline, and deployment path.

footer.description: AI systems embedded directly into your operations. We design, build, and deploy digital employees.
footer.motto: Humans and Machines are Working Together.
